1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality boundary to use as spatial filter

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas intersecting Kristiansand municipality

3.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones intersecting Kristiansand municipality

6.description: Identify parcels from step 5 intersecting 200-year flood zones

7.description: Count intersecting parcels and remove duplicates
